scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend,admin -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w backend" "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w admin"
scripts.build: npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w admin
scripts.db:migrate: docker compose up -d postgres && docker compose build backend && docker compose run --rm backend sh -c "npx prisma migrate deploy"
scripts.db:seed: docker compose up -d postgres && docker compose build backend && docker compose run --rm backend sh -c "npx prisma generate && node prisma/seed.js"
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run build && npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
